main_direction: keep depth + camera -> unproject -> render; hold confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask as the only local lead, keep cloud off, and only allow one new anchor-conditioned conf_depth semantics candidate after the completed local attribution v3 pass
current_cloud_blocker: The current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead fixes the remaining grad+conf confidence-routing leak on top of the confdepth_dropworst_only route and further improves conf_depth/reg_depth without rebounding camera/T, but both depth terms are still materially worse than baseline on the tighter local gate, so the local training axis is not fully fixed and cloud must remain closed.

why_lead: The current local lead keeps the same nearest_ring + geom_plus_raw input path, preserves the conf_depth-specific drop-worst rule, and also makes grad+conf confidence weighting respect the narrowed conf_depth mask.

On the tighter 10-train / 5-val local gate, it improves val_loss_conf_depth from 0.2514 to 0.2289 and val_loss_reg_depth from 0.1799 to 0.1760 versus the previous confdepth_dropworst_only lead while keeping val_loss_T and val_loss_camera flat.
It is still not cloud-ready because val_loss_conf_depth and val_loss_reg_depth remain worse than baseline.

historical_stage_markers.name: nearest_rawpool
historical_stage_markers.note: Historical lead only. Do not treat this config as the current nightly lead.

accepted_findings.fact: Depth, confidence, regression, and unproject geometry supervision are already driven by batch point_masks, not by source-only raw views directly.
On the settled rawpool supervision audit, source-only raw views already have zero point pixels and zero camera/depth/unproject geometry-loss eligibility.
Camera supervision is now filtered at the frame level by real supervised point support, so source-only raw views no longer enter camera loss just because another frame in the sample is valid.
Depth loss now supports respect_conf_mask_in_grad_conf, so the grad+conf branch can stop confidence-weighting pixels that the conf_depth-specific routing already removed from conf supervision.

The confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask follow-up is the current local lead: versus confdepth_dropworst_only on the tighter gate, val loss_conf_depth improves from 0.2514 to 0.2289 and val loss_reg_depth improves from 0.1799 to 0.1760 while val loss_T and val loss_camera stay flat.

Even after the gradconfmask fix, the current lead is still not baseline-clean: on val, loss_conf_depth stays higher than baseline (0.2289 vs 0.1181) and loss_reg_depth stays higher than baseline (0.1760 vs 0.1181), so cloud remains blocked.

The completed attribution v3 audit keeps the same anchor-only conf_depth finding on the audited 32-sample val slice and now narrows the next local move further: the only clearly positive camera-level conf_depth delta is concentrated in anchor Camera_B1, so the next allowed candidate family is anchor-conditioned conf target normalization.
The active_view_mean aggregation candidate is numerically redundant under the current 4-image recipe and does not create a new promotable lead.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: min_supervised_views_2
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Worse camera, translation, and unproject geometry than baseline.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: source_anchor_policy_max_depth_conf
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Worse objective, camera, translation, depth confidence, depth regression, and unproject geometry than baseline.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: dropworst_supervised
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Superseded by the narrower conf_depth-only route and never cleared the local promotion rule.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: confdepth_dropworst_trainmix50
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Reduced train-time rawpool exposure but sharply regressed camera, translation, conf_depth, reg_depth, unproject geometry, and objective versus the current lead.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask_viewmean
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Numerically redundant under the current 4-image recipe.

frozen_non_reentry_candidates.name: exclude_rawpool_only_supervision_standalone
frozen_non_reentry_candidates.reason: Already true on the current code path and therefore not a real candidate axis.

next_local_diagnostic.name: conf_depth_attribution_v3
next_local_diagnostic.goal: Decide whether the remaining conf_depth gap is primarily anchor-conditioned, frame-concentrated, region-conditioned, or a tail-distribution problem before opening one new candidate.

non_goals: Do not reopen v10/v11 inference-side patch collection.
Do not reopen global zju_min_depth_conf sweeps.
Do not reopen reliable-region or bottom-only auxiliary unproject losses.
Do not restore the ghost stack.
Do not launch any cloud pair while the current local training axis is still unresolved.

nightly_modes.name: diagnostic_only
nightly_modes.when: No genuinely new local training candidate has been checked in since the previous night.
steps: Run preflight and require zero active Modal apps plus zero stale repo-scoped python/powershell/modal processes.
Run conf_depth attribution v3 on the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead.
Emit anchor, frame, and region summaries plus one candidate recommendation; do not train and keep cloud_gate=false.

nightly_modes.name: single_candidate_local_gate
nightly_modes.when: Exactly one new local training-side candidate has been checked in and it is genuinely different from the frozen non-reentry list.
steps: Run the supervision audit on the candidate config only if its dataset or loss routing differs from the current lead.
Run one tighter local gate against baseline and the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead; do not branch into a second candidate the same night.
Promote only if camera/T do not materially rebound and conf_depth/reg_depth both improve versus the current lead.

promotion_requirements_before_cloud_cons: Keep val_loss_camera no materially worse than the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead.
Keep val_loss_T no worse than the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead.
Improve val_loss_conf_depth versus the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead.
Improve val_loss_reg_depth versus the current confdepth_dropworst_gradconfmask lead.
Do not introduce new path, cache, or raw-image loading failures.
Even after a local pass, require a fresh manual decision before flipping cloud_gate.
